about_preview.highlight_1: Over 15 years of community healthcare experience
about_preview.highlight_2: JCI international accreditation — highest medical standard

about.hero_sub: Over 15 years partnering with community health — professional, dedicated, trustworthy
about.intro_desc_1: Founded in 2007, VitaFamily is a pioneering private hospital bringing international medical standards to Hanoi and all of Northern Vietnam. Over 15 years of continuous growth, we are now one of the leading international hospitals in the region, serving both Vietnamese and international patients.
about.intro_desc_2: Located in the heart of Dong Da District, VitaFamily provides comprehensive specialist medical services, strictly adhering to international safety and quality standards while fully complying with Vietnam's Ministry of Health regulations.
strengths: Team of 120+ internationally trained specialist doctors
Next-generation medical equipment, most advanced in the region
Serving both Vietnamese and international patients
JCI accreditation — highest medical standard in the world

milestones.desc: VitaFamily International Hospital founded as a joint venture between Australian medical experts and Vietnam's Bach Mai Hospital.
Converted to 100% foreign-invested capital, adopting the French international hospital model and renamed VitaFamily.
Achieved ISO 9001 Quality Management System certification.
Continuously received the Comprehensive Excellence Hospital Award from the Ministry of Health.
Achieved JCI international accreditation — the world's highest medical standard. The first hospital in Northern Vietnam to receive this distinction.
Inaugurated a new 7-floor Building B — increasing inpatient bed capacity to 170 beds.
Opened the new Outpatient Building integrating Emergency, Outpatient, and modern Diagnostic Imaging facilities.

about.awards_subtitle: Achievements that demonstrate our unwavering commitment to improving medical service quality

awards.name: Outstanding achievement in supporting the business community
Commendation for improving service quality and customer satisfaction
JCI International Accreditation — highest medical standard
Green Energy Star
awards.by: Hanoi Department of Industry and Trade

awards.name: "Green, Clean Hospital and High-Quality Medical Services" Award
awards.by: Vietnam Union of Science and Technology Associations

about.cta_desc: VitaFamily is an ideal workplace for outstanding medical professionals. We provide an international work environment, leading advanced medical equipment, and a highly qualified team of doctors. If you want to become part of the VitaFamily, we would love to hear from you.

customer_guide.hero_desc: Complete information on outpatient procedures, admission, payment, and hospital amenities — helping you prepare for every visit.

outpatient.title: Outpatient Visit
outpatient.booking_or_online: or book online via our website.
notes: Arrive 5–10 minutes early to complete registration and/or sample collection.
If you cannot arrive on time, please notify us in advance at: 024 3577 1100.
Arriving early helps the hospital manage scheduling and reduces waiting time.

steps.title: Go to Reception
steps.desc: Outpatient area (Floor 1 – Building A) or Information desk (Floor 1 – Building B). Staff will confirm your appointment and direct you to the appropriate specialty.

steps.title: Consultation & Payment
steps.desc: Pay consultation fees after your appointment with the doctor.

steps.title: Collect Medication
steps.desc: Purchase prescribed medication at the Pharmacy – Floor 1, Building A.

steps.title: Complete Insurance
steps.desc: The Insurance Guarantee Office assists with all insurance-related steps (if applicable).

outpatient.info_docs: Please bring your ID/passport, health insurance card (if applicable), and any previous test results or diagnostic images.

inpatient.title: Inpatient Admission
inpatient.intro: The inpatient admission process is designed to ensure speed, convenience, and safety — providing complete information on timing, procedures, and necessary instructions.
time_items: Emergency or out-of-hours maternity admission: accepted 24/7
inpatient.prep_highlight: For patients scheduled for a procedure or surgery:
prep_items: Fast for at least 6 hours before the procedure/surgery
Do not smoke for at least 12 hours before the procedure
Your doctor will provide specific instructions for each case
inpatient.procedure_p1: When your doctor orders admission, reception staff will explain relevant matters, arrange the admission date, and provide the inpatient information sheet.
inpatient.procedure_p2: Patients must complete and sign a "Consent to Treatment" form — confirming they have been fully informed of benefits, risks, and agree to proceed.
docs_items: Health insurance or private insurance card (if applicable)
Referral letter or admission order (if applicable)
Previous medical records, test results, X-rays (if applicable)
inpatient.rooms_note: Each room is fully equipped with bath gel, shampoo, toothbrush, toothpaste, and other necessities.
inpatient.cancel_note: Please notify at least 02 days before your scheduled admission date.

payment.title: Pricing & Payment Policy
payment.intro: All medical services at the hospital are charged according to the current price list.
outpatient_items: Consultation & advisory fees are paid after the appointment with your doctor
Costs for lab tests, diagnostic imaging, medication, or outpatient procedures must be paid before the service is used
inpatient_items: Upon admission order, you will be informed of estimated costs and asked to sign the "Consent to Treatment"
Reception, cashier, or Insurance Guarantee staff will assist with all administrative steps
The inpatient bill is settled and paid before discharge
The hospital does not accept personal credit
payment.deposit_p1: Upon admission, you will be asked to make a treatment deposit. The deposit amount is based on the treatment plan and room type.
payment.deposit_info: If you have insurance but the hospital has not yet received a Guarantee Letter, please proceed with the deposit. The deposit will be refunded upon discharge once confirmation is received.
payment.deposit_methods: Deposit accepted via: cash · credit card · bank transfer
refund_items: Upon discharge, pay any costs not covered by your insurance company
Cash refunds: collected at the cashier
Card refunds: transferred to your credit account per State Bank regulations
payment.insurance_p1: The hospital works with most domestic and international insurance companies — currently with direct payment agreements with 43 insurance companies, 7 support units, and 1 insurance management company.
payment.insurance_highlight: When visiting or being admitted, please present:
insurance_docs: Insurance card or insurance contract details
payment.insurance_contact_name: Mr. Truong Kieu Nghi – Head of Customer Care & Partnership Operations

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.intro: Beyond our international medical quality, the hospital provides a comprehensive care experience through a well-invested amenities system.

cards.title: Free Parking
cards.desc: Motorbike and car parking at basement levels B1 and B2, managed by a modern automated system — completely free of charge.

cards.title: Free Hospital-Wide Wi-Fi
cards.desc: The entire campus has high-speed Wi-Fi coverage, serving patients and their families' connectivity and information needs.

cards.title: 24/7 Security
cards.desc: Inpatient areas are secured by card-access systems with strict 24/7 surveillance from a central control room.

amenities.cafe_location: Located on Floor 1, Building B — an elegant and welcoming dining space for patients, families, and medical staff.
amenities.cafe_desc: A diverse menu for varied tastes: authentic Western dishes and familiar Asian comfort food such as pho, rice, and noodles — prepared with fresh ingredients ensuring nutrition and food safety.
amenities.bakery_location: Right on Floor 1, Building B lobby — enjoy authentic French light dining with handcrafted pastries and refined beverages from the Saint-Honoré brand.
amenities.bakery_desc: A cozy space, serving all day — perfect for early morning appointments or mid-treatment breaks.
amenities.quote: With the motto of "putting the patient first", the hospital always aims for comprehensive healthcare of both body and mind.

visit.title: Hospital Visiting Policy

hours_cards.label: Intensive Care & Special Care Unit (ICU) — daily

visit.hours_note: Caregivers may stay as directed by the attending physician.
rules: Visit during designated hours only
Maximum 2 visitors per visit
Sanitize hands when entering/leaving the room
Leave when the patient requires medical care
Do not sit on the patient's bed
Do not touch medical equipment, wounds, or IV lines
Do not bring pets, flowers, or plants
Do not bring strong-smelling food or beverages
Keep quiet, set phones to silent
No smoking (except in permitted areas near H Café)
Children under 16 must be accompanied by an adult
No overnight stays in patient rooms
The hospital is not responsible for lost or stolen items
Parents may visit and stay in the pediatric room
Other visitors must follow standard visiting hours
Parents may enter at any time (except during medical care)
Follow sterile protocols: wear protective clothing, no personal items
Do not touch equipment/incubators without permission
No other visitors (including children)
Children under 16: parents may visit (except during emergencies)
Strictly follow infection control guidelines
Maximum 2 visitors per visit
Fathers may enter the delivery room (for natural births)
Children under 16 must be accompanied by an adult
Entry only when permitted by medical staff

visit.health_warning: For the safety of patients and the community, please do not visit if you have:
visit.responsibility_intro: The hospital encourages family members to actively cooperate in patient care:
responsibility_items: Assist with eating, medication, or personal hygiene as directed by nursing staff
Respect and cooperate with medical staff, follow instructions throughout the visit
Maintain a polite and calm demeanor to create a safe and quiet environment for patients
